title: Melangé (Flagship Event – BVEST 2019)
subtitle: To encourage analytical thinking, logical reasoning, and decision-making skills among participants through interactive competitive rounds involving estimation and strategic bidding.
description: Melangé was conducted as a multi-round flagship event during BVEST 2019, organised in collaboration with multiple student societies including BVP OSA. The event combined general awareness, estimation skills, and strategy-based gameplay to create an engaging and intellectually stimulating experience for participants.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Round 1 – Guesstimation: Participants answered estimation-based questions testing logical thinking and reasoning abilities.
Round 2 – Silent Auction: Participants used strategic bidding within limited resources to win items, encouraging decision-making and planning.
Combination of logical reasoning and strategy-based activities
Collaborative effort involving several student chapters including BVP OSA
